title: notholaena elegans
intro: Notholaena elegans, also known as Elegant Cliff Fern, is a species of fern native to the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Notholaena elegans include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Notholaena elegans typically involve drying the leaves and roots to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
